title: andropogon pohlianus
intro: Andropogon pohlianus is a species of grass native to tropical Africa, also known as East African sweet grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Andropogon pohlianus include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used in African traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
